childhood.familyBackground: Jared Daniel Kaplan is a theoretical physicist and artificial intelligence researcher. He is an associate professor in the Johns Hopkins University Department of Physics & Astronomy, and a co-founder
childhood.familyBackgroundKo: Jared Daniel Kaplan은 이론 물리학자이자 인공지능 연구자입니다. 그는 존스 홉킨스 대학교 물리학 및 천문학과 부교수이며, Anthropic의 공동 창업자이자 최고과학책임자입니다.
childhood.education: Details of Jared Kaplan's education are not widely documented in public sources.
childhood.educationKo: Jared Kaplan의 교육 세부사항은 공개 자료에서 널리 기록되지 않음.
childhood.earlyLife: Jared Kaplan built a career in Artificial intelligence.
childhood.earlyLifeKo: Jared Kaplan은(는) Artificial intelligence 분야에서 경력을 쌓음.

careerTimeline.event: Became a major figure in Artificial intelligence
careerTimeline.eventKo: Artificial intelligence 분야의 주요 인물로 부상

failures.description: COVID-19 pandemic impacted business operations globally
failures.descriptionKo: 코로나19 팬데믹이 전 세계적으로 사업 운영에 영향
failures.lesson: Resilience and adaptability are essential in times of crisis

personalTraits.knownFor: Building wealth through Artificial intelligence. Net worth $7B.
personalTraits.knownForKo: Artificial intelligence을(를) 통해 부를 축적. 순자산 10조원.
